title: Dance, Dance, Little Ewok
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{InUniverseMedia |image= |name=Dance, Dance, Little Ewok |author= |editor= |illustrator= |artist= |performer=[[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]]''[[The New Jedi Order: Star by Star]]'' |publisher= |release date= |media type=[[Music/Legends|Song]] |pages= |published in= |genre=Lullaby }} {{Quote|I'm sure that every yammosk war coordinator will be mesmerized by 'Dance, Dance, Little Ewok.{{'}}''"
"''Why not? It works as well as anything we have tried.|[[Mara Jade Skywalker]] and [[Cilghal]]|}} "'''Dance, Dance, Little Ewok'''" was a lullaby [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] would sing to his son, [[Ben Skywalker|Ben]]. {{Music-stub}} ==Appearances== *''[[The New Jedi Order: Star by Star]]'' {{1st}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Lullabies and nursery rhymes]]
